parameters.content:
## Extract Job Listings from Website

Recruiting teams use this recipe to convert public job posts into structured records for matching and reporting. Extract role details, requirements, salary ranges, and application links from career pages.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes before importing. Self-hosted n8n only.

### Step 1: Extract Website Data
Resource: **Website Extraction**

Configure the public website URL and schema below, then connect your credentials.

parameters.schemaJson: {"fields":[{"name":"role_title","type":"TEXT","description":"Job title"},{"name":"location","type":"TEXT","description":"Job location or remote policy"},{"name":"salary_range","type":"TEXT","description":"Compensation or salary range"},{"name":"requirements","type":"ARRAY","description":"Required qualifications","fields":[{"name":"requirement","type":"TEXT","description":"One requirement"}]},{"name":"application_url","type":"TEXT","description":"URL or instructions for applying"}]}
